title: Too Many Dimensions
description: Mod That Adds Many Dimensions to the game! You can visit all of them on creative
body:
This mod adds lots of dimensions!

Its on beta so dont expect very much dimensions

v. 1.2.5 (1.2.6 is coming soon)

How to create a portal?

Place blocks like(in form of) Nether portal (Example: If you place wooden blocks like nether portal, you will get wooden dimension)

Then go to the next creative inventory page and go to the Portal named page. Then pick Igniter what you need (If you build it in Oak planks, you will need Wooden Igniter)

Added Dimensions:

Glass dimension

Oak planks dimension

TNT dimension

![Explore an TNT dimension! (sorry for image 850 pixels is max)](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1030234/description_6152b9e0-bfa9-4714-87c4-1b39e6ef45de.png)

Explore an TNT dimension!

Dirt dimension

Stone Dimension

Iron Dimension

Gold Dimension

Lapis Laluzi Dimension

Redstone Dimension

Diamond Dimension

Netherite Dimension

Emerald Dimension

Scaffolding Dimension

Sculk Dimension

Podzol Dimension

Red Wool Dimension

Magma Dimension

Smooth Stone Dimension

Green Glass Dimension

Bamboo Dimension

Copper Dimension

Nether Brick Dimension - Most advanced yet!

Others: 1 additional block (needed for versions before 1.21)

Some Biomes have theme-based trees (almost done), theme-based Fog (WIP) and more!

Structures may be added

More Trades
